name: ClickSend
shortDescription: Comprehensive communication platform integration enabling SMS, MMS, voice messages, fax, and postal mail delivery. Manage contact lists and launch multi-channel campaigns with ease.

actions.name: Send SMS
actions.description: Send SMS to one recipient with optional scheduling and sender customization.

actions.name: Create Contact List
actions.description: Create new contact list for organizing and managing contacts.

actions.name: Create Contact
actions.description: Creates a new contact in the given contact list with comprehensive contact information.

actions.name: Delete Contact
actions.description: Delete a specific contact from the list permanently.

actions.name: Delete Contact List
actions.description: Delete a specific contact list permanently.

actions.name: Create SMS Campaign
actions.description: Create SMS Campaign allows you to create and send up to 20,000 SMS messages to users from one contact list in a single API call. If the 'Schedule' input field is left empty, the SMS campaign will be sent immediately.

actions.name: Send Fax
actions.description: Sends a new fax document in PDF format to a specified recipient.

actions.name: Send Letter
actions.description: The PDF document is sent by mail. It is printed, folded, placed in an envelope, and delivered to any address worldwide.

actions.name: Send MMS
actions.description: Send MMS to one recipient with media file attachment and optional scheduling.

actions.name: Send MMS Campaign
actions.description: Send MMS Campaign allows you to send up to 20,000 MMS to users from one contact list in one API call.

actions.name: Send Postcard
actions.description: Sends a postcard through the mail. The PDF file is printed and shipped to any address worldwide.

actions.name: Send SMS To Contact List
actions.description: This method enables you to send up to 1,000 SMS messages to a targeted list of contacts.

actions.name: Send Voice Message
actions.description: Send a text-to-speech voice message with customizable voice and language options.

actions.name: Update Contact
actions.description: Update a specific existing contact with new information.

actions.name: Search Contact By Email
actions.description: Search for a contact in a given contact list based on an email address.

actions.name: Search Contact By Phone
actions.description: Search for a contact in a given contact list by phone number.

actions.name: Search Contact List
actions.description: Search a contact list by its name.

actions.name: Raw ClickSend Request
actions.description: Performs a raw http request to the ClickSend service. The request can be arbitrarily configured. More detailed information on how to form a specific request to the ClickSend service can be found here: https://developers.clicksend.com/docs

actions.name: Send Voice Message To Contact List
actions.description: Sends text-to-speech messages to contacts from a specific contact list. You can post up to 1000 messages with each API call.

idealUseCases: Sending transactional SMS notifications for order updates and alerts
Managing customer contact lists with automated campaigns
Delivering voice messages for appointment reminders and confirmations
Sending physical postcards and letters for marketing campaigns
Creating multi-channel communication workflows combining SMS, MMS, and voice
Building customer support notification systems with multiple delivery methods
Automating bulk messaging campaigns to targeted contact segments
Integrating fax delivery for document-heavy business processes
